mnemonics: GPU: Graphics Processing Unit. Remember: 'Graphics Power Unleashed' for parallel processing.
keyPoints: GPUs are specialized for parallel computation, handling thousands of threads simultaneously.
They use a SIMD (Single Instruction, Multiple Data) architecture for efficient data parallelism.
CUDA and OpenCL are common programming frameworks for GPU computing.
commonMistakes: Assuming GPU programming is identical to CPU programming, ignoring thread hierarchy and memory management.
Not optimizing memory access patterns, leading to poor performance on GPU architectures.
